name: Angela

skills.name: Flame Incantation
skills.description: Every time she damages an enemy with a skill, she increases her Movement Speed, and the enemy will take more damage from her subsequent skills.

skills.name: Scorching Barrage
skills.description: Unleashes fireballs at the target area that deals multi-phase damage toenemy heroes.

skills.name: Chaos Cinder
skills.description: Hurls a fireball at the target location that turns into a firestorm when it hitsan enemy or reaches its max range, slowing and dealing damage to nearbyenemies.Any enemy that is hit directly by the fireball is stunned.

skills.name: Blazing Brilliance
skills.description: Channels a blazing beam in the target direction, dealing damage over timeGains a shield and immunity while the shield is active.

tips: Angela is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.8% win rate and 2.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Stone of Sorcery → Scepter of Reverberation → Blood Clan's Grimoire → Insatiable Tome → Savant's Wrath.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Angela's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Scorching Barrage → Chaos Cinder → Blazing Brilliance → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Angela excels into Jing, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Gao Changgong without team peel.

Angela is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.0% — expect Angela to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Angela good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Angela is Tier S+ Mage with 51.8% win rate, 2.3% pick rate, and 3.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Angela build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Stone of Sorcery, Scepter of Reverberation, Blood Clan's Grimoire, Insatiable Tome, Savant's Wrath. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Angela?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Gao Changgong into Angela. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Angela completes core items. Angela struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Angela counter?
faqs.answer: Angela is strong into Jing, Athena, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Angela when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Angela good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Angela is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.0% — expect Angela to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Angela play?
faqs.answer: Angela is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Angela?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Angela or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Angela vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Angela has +0.8% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Angela when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Angela?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 3.0% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Mage.
